title: PirateDive
body:
![PirateDiveLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rHqfkN2G/images/81e84fe8c44bc6e658880bbc429d5c4d142e8ed1.png)



ripoff sea of thieves frfr.

**-================-**

PirateDive is a ocean content update that aims to add various features to provide new reasons to explore the ocean. PirateDive is a, you guessed it, a mod themed around pirates (even though it doesn't have pirates) You can find Pirate Gold in all ocean structure chests, which; is the main resource for the mod. 

**IF NOT ALREADY INSTALLED THE MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB**


Recommend to have JEI or REI installed to find all the recipes.

To get the Palm Wood set you have to make a Pirate Trading Post and place it next to a villager :)

**What are the current features?**
You can find a showcase of all the features in my latest video here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-2otQBuEobI&t=52s  (THIS IS NOT MY LATEST VIDEO, A NEW ONE WILL BE UPLOADED SOON WITH ALL THE FEATURES)

**Will PirateDive be on more versions of Minecraft**
In the next month I plan to *hopefully* add 1.20, 1.20.2, 1.20.3, and 1.20.4. Hopefully when 1.21 releases I can get a version for that as well. 

**What do I plan to add in the feature?**
As of right now PirateDive is currently only in it's release version, so as expected does not have all the planned features, so what do I want too add?

- Pirate Ship structures which will spawn throughout the ocean
- Aggressive Pirate entities which will look like the vindicators
- Flintlocks and guns
- More fish and ocean blocks!
- Rats which will spawn in pirate ships (and will be tameable)
- Monkeys that spawn in the jungle
- Palm trees that naturally spawn on beaches (maybe)
- If Palm trees are added then coconuts
- Various weapons including a coconut launcher, dabloon shrapnel bomb, handheld cannon, etc.
- More hats!
- Buff items like a pirate claw which would increase your attack damage
- Pirate Alchohol

*so uh yea I want to add alot*
